properties.displayName: Infostealer — non-browser process accessing browser cookie/login DBs
properties.description: Stealers (RedLine, Lumma, Vidar, Atomic) read Login Data / cookies SQLite from Chrome/Edge/Firefox.
properties.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FolderPath has_any ("\Google\Chrome\User Data\","\Microsoft\Edge\User Data\","\Mozilla\Firefox\Profiles\")
| where FileName in~ ("Login Data","Cookies","logins.json","cookies.sqlite")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FolderPath, FileName, ActionType
